description: Example MCP tool access policy for Open WebUI assistants and groups. Current operational tools are provided by the existing erify_api MCP entrypoint.
notes: The existing erify_api MCP tools are read-only and studio-scoped.
Require a separate approval and audit design before enabling write tools.
Do not expose the private Railway MCP endpoint publicly without the public access-control design.
Business data access should be logged by the MCP service itself.
